name: pdp_ecomm_template
description: Generate RMBC-structured product detail page (PDP) copy for e-commerce — extracts proven structure from top-performing pages and rewrites for a new product.

product_name.description: Product name as it appears on the label/site.

product_description.description: What the product is, what it does, core value proposition.

key_ingredients_features.description: Top ingredients or features with proof points (clinical data, patents, percentages).

target_audience.description: ICP description — demographics, psychographics, core pain.

reference_page_url.description: URL of a high-performing PDP to extract structure from.

traffic_source.description: One of: meta, native, organic, email. Default: meta. Adjusts tone/length.
